- Closes #

## Review Checklist

- [ ] PR targets `master` and is ready for admin/code owner review.
- [ ] Copilot review has been requested or automatic Copilot review has run.
- [ ] No untrusted imported data is written to the DOM with unsafe HTML.
- [ ] Offline-first behavior is preserved; no new CDN/runtime dependency was added without justification.
- [ ] Local storage, IndexedDB, ZIP/JSON import, and upload paths were considered if touched.
- [ ] Question schema compatibility is preserved for `STANDARD`, `MULTI`, `YES_NO_MATRIX`, `SEQUENCE`, and `DRAG_DROP_SELECT`.
- [ ] Public-repo content safety was checked: no official dumps, proprietary packs, private ZIPs, or personal browser data are included.
- [ ] Manual browser checks or relevant validation steps are listed below.

## Validation

<!-- List commands, browser checks, screenshots, or explain why validation is not needed. -->
